Planets.DescriptionEN: [NOT CURRENTLY ACCESSIBLE] Nyx I is a coreless planet that orbits closest to the sun in the Nyx system. Once considered impossible to terraform, Nyx I has undergone a drastic transformation thanks to new experimental technology developed by Genesis Terraforming.
Planets.DescriptionCN: [目前无法访问]尼克斯I是尼克斯星系中距离恒星最近的一颗无核行星。这颗行星曾被认为无法进行地球化改造，但得益于创世纪地球化改造公司研发的新型实验性技术，尼克斯I已发生了翻天覆地的变化。

Planets.DescriptionEN: [NOT CURRENTLY ACCESSIBLE] A high-pressure atmosphere and thick clouds of acid and carbon dioxide make Nyx II not worth terraforming.
Planets.DescriptionCN: [当前不可访问]超高的大气压以及充斥着酸雨和二氧化碳的浓厚云层使尼克斯 II 并不值得进行类地化改造。

Planets.DescriptionEN: [NOT CURRENTLY ACCESSIBLE] Nyx III is an ice giant that lacks a breathable atmosphere or any valuable minerals.
Planets.DescriptionCN: [当前不可访问]尼克斯 III 是一颗缺乏可呼吸大气和任何有价值矿物的冰巨星。

Places.DescriptionEN: This mining facility was abandoned for years before UEE refugees took up residence. Dedicated to the creation of an egalitarian society, Levski has evolved into a self-sustaining port of political activists and those wishing to escape the eye of the Empire.
Places.DescriptionCN: 在UEE的难民进驻之前这个采矿设施就已荒废多年。立志于成为一个平等主义社会，列夫斯基已经发展成为政治活动家和那些希望逃脱帝国眼线的人自给自足的港口。

Stars.DescriptionEN: A K-type main sequence flare star.

Planets.DescriptionEN: This icy terrestrial world has a breathable atmosphere of nitrogen and oxygen and has been overrun by outlaws. Potential Ship Mineables: Quartz Borase Riccite Stileron Potential Ground Vehicle Mineables: Beradon Potential Hand Mineables: Aphorite Dolivine Janalite Potential Harvestables: Flareweed Stalk Amiant Pod Ranta Dung (Caves) Amioshi Plague (Caves) Bluemoon Fungus (Caves) Potential Creatures: Quasigrazer
Planets.DescriptionCN: 这个被不法之徒盘踞的寒冷类地星球有着可呼吸的含氧与氮的大气。 可能存在的飞船可开采物： 石英 波射石 愈金 稀钛铁 可能存在的地面载具可开采物： 冰蓝珀 可能存在的手持工具可开采物： 紫钠水晶 暗橄榄石 加纳石 可能存在的可采摘物： 火炬草茎 石棉荚 兰塔有机粪便（洞穴） 阿米什瘟疫（洞穴） 蓝月菌（洞穴） 可能存在的生物： 故夕食草兽

SpaceStations.DescriptionEN: Situated high above Pyro III, Orbituary station is the domain of the Rough & Ready gang who operate the refueling services for outlaws and civilians alike. While a convenient place to stock up and get a night’s rest, make sure you don’t let your guard down.
SpaceStations.DescriptionCN: 位于派罗III高处的轨道讣闻站是给不法分子和平民提供燃料补给服务的狂勇帮领地。虽说这个地方是个便于存储和休息的好地方，但在这里还是别放松警惕最好。

Places.DescriptionEN: A pretty good place for miners.
Places.DescriptionCN: 对矿工而言是一个很好的地方。

Feuds between factions have lead to frequent and deadly battles; making this location extremely dangerous for civilians and outlaws alike.
SpaceStations.DescriptionCN: 环绕在派罗VI轨道上的黄金地平线的平台。它由焰火联合公司拥有并经营，直到它被遗弃，然后被法外之徒占领。派系之间的争斗导致了频繁而致命的战斗；这使得此地对于平民和不法分子来说都极其危险。

Places.DescriptionEN: Trading for a better tomorrow.

Places.DescriptionEN: It's a good deal when everyone leaves unhappy.
Places.DescriptionCN: 所谓好交易就是所有人都苦着脸离开。

SpaceStations.DescriptionEN: Located at the L4 Lagrange point of Pyro II, this dilapidated station was originally established by Pyrotechnic Amalgamated to supply their workers with fuel and other resources. Today, the fierce Rough & Ready gang uses the station to offer outlaws traveling the system a place to stop for fuel, supplies, and a bit of entertainment. Just be sure to mind your manners.
SpaceStations.DescriptionCN: 这个由焰火联合公司建立的破旧加油站位于派罗II的L4拉格朗日点，曾经是为工人们提供燃料和其他资源的地方。如今，凶悍的狂勇帮利用这个加油站为在星系中旅行的不法分子提供一个可以在此停留、加油、补给和娱乐的地方。不过，记得注意礼貌。

SpaceStations.DescriptionEN: The Dudley family’s been working hard to provide quality refueling services for over a decade. Come by to experience the Dudley Difference.
SpaceStations.DescriptionCN: 十多年来，达德利一家一直致力于提供优质的加油服务，来体验一下达德利的与众不同之处吧。

SpaceStations.DescriptionEN: Pyro’s Rough, so you better get Ready. Stop by this station for fuel, supplies, and a bit of entertainment. Just be sure to mind your manners.

SpaceStations.DescriptionEN: The only refueling station in Pyro good enough to be called Megumi.

SpaceStations.DescriptionEN: Situated at a strategic location near the Pyro-Nyx jump point, the Gateway station provides shops and services to those traveling to and from the system. Visitors to the station can find a wide variety of amenities and stores including: Refueling, Restocking, Cargo Transfers, Supplies, Habs, and more.
SpaceStations.DescriptionCN: 位于靠近跳跃点的战略地点，星门空间站能为那些进出星系的旅行者解决购物和其他服务的需求。到此空间站的访客可以找到种类繁多的便民设施和商品：加油服务、弹药补充、货物装卸、补给、胶囊公寓和其他的服务与设施。

SpaceStations.DescriptionEN: Whether your hull’s full of holes, your quantum tank’s drier than an overcooked aloprat, or you need a place to sleep one off, head over to Patch City at Pyro III’s L3 Lagrange and the Rough & Ready gang will get you fixed up and back on your way. If you have the credits that is.
SpaceStations.DescriptionCN: 不管你的船是满的还是漏的，亦或者说你的量子油箱比烤焦的阿罗帕鼠还要干，又或者你需要一个睡觉的好地方，你都可以去派罗III的L3拉格朗日点的补丁城去找狂勇帮来帮你解决这些问题，让你能重返你的航线。当然，你得有足够的信用点。

SpaceStations.DescriptionEN: Situated at a strategic location near the Pyro-Stanton jump point, and considered by many to be the last bastion of civilization in the system, the Stanton Gateway provides shops and services to those traveling to and from the system. Visitors to the station can find a wide variety of amenities and stores including: Refueling, Restocking, Cargo Transfers, Supplies, Habs, and more.
SpaceStations.DescriptionCN: 位于靠近派罗-斯坦顿跳跃点的战略位置，斯坦顿星门被许多人视为该星系中最后的文明堡垒。这里为来往两个星系的旅客提供商店和服务。游客可以在该空间站找到各种设施和商店，包括：燃料补充、弹药补给、货物运输、物资供应、居住区域等等。

SpaceStations.StationNameCN: 派罗 - 斯坦顿 跳跃点
SpaceStations.DescriptionEN: This jump point connects Pyro to the Stanton system.

SpaceStations.DescriptionEN: From repairing your ship to grabbing a snack, the independently owned Starlight Service Station at the L1 Lagrange of Pyro III offers everything your vehicle and crew needs on your journey through the system.
SpaceStations.DescriptionCN: 从维修飞船到享用小吃，位于派罗III的L1拉格朗日点的星光空间服务站将为您的飞船和船员提供在该星系旅程中所需要的一切。

Planets.DescriptionEN: Buildings cover a majority of the planet’s surface with residential areas relegated to the poles while ArcCorp’s factories, business headquarters, financial and commercial districts are located in between.
Planets.DescriptionCN: 建筑覆盖了星球大部分的表面，其中居住区位于两极，而弧光集团的工厂、商业总部、金融和商业区则坐落在两极之间。

Moons.DescriptionEN: This icy moon features active cryogeysers and cryovolcanoes. Potential Ship Mineables: Iron Copper Laranite Quantainium Potential Hand Mineables: Aphorite Dolivine Janalite
Moons.DescriptionCN: 这颗冰冻卫星拥有活跃的低温间歇泉和冰火山。 可能存在的飞船开采矿物： 铁 铜 砬兰石 量子矿 可能存在的手持开采矿物： 紫钠水晶 暗橄榄石 加纳石

SpaceStations.DescriptionEN: The primary cargo and transfer point for ArcCorp. Perfect as a waypoint on your down or back from the surface, Baijini Point features plenty of amenities for travelers while also providing a top-tier loading/unloading system for capital ships that are unable to head down to the surface. Includes shops and services like: Refueling, Restocking, Cargo Transfers, Personal Weapons, Personal Armor, Clothing, Food, a Clinic, and Habs.
SpaceStations.DescriptionCN: 弧光星的主要货运与客运中转站。作为往来星球地表的完美中转站，拜基尼空间站为游客提供了大量便利设施，同时也为无法在地面着陆的超大型飞船提供顶级装卸系统。这里提供各式商店和服务，你可以运输货物、购买个人武器、个人护甲、衣物、食品，还提供燃料补充、弹药补给和住宿以及医疗服务。

Places.DescriptionEN: Area18 is one of the main commercial ports for interplanetary traffic in the surrounding region of ArcCorp. Travelers can find a variety of goods from trusted names as well as local providers, if they’re not overwhelmed by the sights and sounds of this landing zone.
Places.DescriptionCN: 18区是弧光星周边星域最重要的星际贸易港口之一。如果没有被着陆区的景致和声音迷花眼的话，旅行者们可以找到许多种从本土厂商到宇宙知名潮牌的商品。

Planets.DescriptionEN: A low mass gas giant that features a breathable atmosphere at high altitudes. This was an ideal situation for ship manufacturer Crusader, who now occupies the planet’s floating platforms to build massive ships like the Starliner.
Planets.DescriptionCN: 一颗低质量的气态巨行星，在其高海拔区域有着可供人类呼吸的大气层。这对舰船制造商十字军来说是一个绝佳的环境，现在他们占据了星球上的悬浮平台用以建造诸如星际客机的大型飞船。

Moons.DescriptionEN: Named after the youngest of the three siblings featured in the 25th century children’s morality tale, 'A Gift for Baba,' this moon features over a hundred currently dormant volcanoes that are said to represent Cellin’s simmering anger. Potential Ship Mineables: Quartz Agricium Tarantite Quantainium Potential Hand Mineables: Aphorite Dolivine Hadanite Janalite (Caves only) Potential Harvestables: Ranta Dung (Caves) Amioshi Plague (Caves) Bluemoon Fungus (Caves)
Moons.DescriptionCN: 这颗卫星的名字来源于25世纪著名儿童道德童话“给奶奶的礼物”中三姐弟里的幺妹，赛琳拥有超过一百处的休眠火山，据说这些火山代表了赛琳那潜藏的怒火。 可能存在的飞船开采矿物： 石英 艾格瑞金属 塔兰导电石 量子矿 可能存在的手持开采矿物： 紫钠水晶 暗橄榄石 哈丹水晶 加纳石（仅洞穴） 可能存在的可采摘物： 兰塔有机粪便（洞穴） 阿米什瘟疫（洞穴） 蓝月菌（洞穴）

SpaceStations.DescriptionEN: A brand new outpost built to house an extended Crusader Security presence in this sector. It is expected to be open and operating soon.

Moons.DescriptionEN: Named after the middle brother of the three siblings featured in the 25th century children’s morality tale, 'A Gift for Baba,' this is the largest of Crusader’s moons. Daymar’s slightly eccentric orbit is said to represent his ease at getting lost in the story. Potential Ship Mineables: Quartz Agricium Silicon Quantainium Titanium Potential Hand Mineables: Aphorite Dolivine Hadanite Janalite (Caves only) Potential Harvestables: Ranta Dung (Caves) Amioshi Plague (Caves) Bluemoon Fungus (Caves) Stone Bug Shell (Caves) Potential Creatures Juvenile Valakkar
Moons.DescriptionCN: 戴玛尔的名字来源于25世纪著名儿童道德童话“给奶奶的礼物”中三姐弟里的二弟，是十字军星最大的卫星。戴玛尔那略微偏心的轨道据说是象征着他在童话故事里容易迷路的特点。 可能存在的飞船开采矿物： 石英 艾格瑞金属 硅 量子矿 钛 可能存在的手持开采矿物： 紫钠水晶 暗橄榄石 哈丹水晶 加纳石（仅洞穴） 可能存在的可采摘物： 兰塔有机粪便（洞穴） 阿米什瘟疫（洞穴） 蓝月菌（洞穴） 石虫壳（洞穴） 可能存在的生物： 幼年瓦拉卡蠕虫

SpaceStations.DescriptionEN: Located above Crusader, Seraphim Station offers stunning vistas of the gas giant below and acts as a gateway to Crusader Industries’ vast planetary holdings and orbital shipyards. The station offers a wide variety of services including: Refueling, Restocking, Shopping, Habs, a Clinic, and Cargo Services.
SpaceStations.DescriptionCN: 炽天使空间站位于十字军上方，作为通往十字军工业庞大的行星和轨道造船厂的门户，在这里，你能看到下方气态巨行星的壮丽景色。本空间站提供各种服务，包括：加油、补货、购物、休息、诊所和货运服务。

Places.DescriptionEN: Located high above the clouds, Orison is built upon a military-constructed latticework of inhabitable floating platforms which Crusader Industries uses to manufacture their large-scale ships. The shipyards themselves are famously beautiful and have made Orison a prime tourist destination in the Stanton system.
Places.DescriptionCN: 坐落于云层之上的奥里森以军方建造的可居住悬浮平台集群为基础而建，这些平台也被十字军工业用于建造大型飞船。造船厂本身就是一道声名远扬的靓丽风景线，也让奥里森成为了斯坦顿星系内著名的旅游胜地。

Heavy industry has resulted in severe pollution across the planet. SpaceStations.DescriptionEN: Hurston's primary port of call for Lorville for all large-scale incoming and outgoing cargo. Everus Harbor has been outfitted with a handful of amenities for capital ships and travelers looking for a quick stopover before heading down to the planet surface. Includes shops and services like: Refueling, Restocking, Cargo Transfers, Ship Components, Personal Armor, Clothing, Food, a Clinic, and Habs.
SpaceStations.DescriptionCN: 赫斯顿专为罗威尔大型进出口货物准备的主要港口。埃弗勒斯空间站为主力舰准备了各种配套设施，也是来往星球表面的旅客短暂停留的中转站。这里提供各式商店和服务，你可以运输货物、购买飞船部件、个人护甲、衣物、食品，还提供燃料补充、弹药补给和住宿以及医疗服务。

Places.DescriptionEN: Working to make each day better, this workcenter and its employees are proud to be part of the Sakura Sun family. Interested to learn more? Stop by and experience what makes us a different kind of company for yourself.

Planets.DescriptionEN: A terraforming error left the planet with an unnaturally dense cloud cover and a colder than average climate making it an ideal location for owner microTech to house its heat-sensitive computing and manufacturing centers. Potential Ship Mineables: Iron Ice Hephaestanite Quantainium Potential Hand Mineables: Aphorite Dolivine Janalite Potential Harvestables: Pitambu Golden Medmon Sunset Berry Heart of the Woods Ranta Dung (Caves) Amioshi Plague (Caves) Bluemoon Fungus (Caves) Potential Creatures: Kopion Marok Quasigrazer
Planets.DescriptionCN: 一个类地化改造中的差错使得此星球上有着异常稠密的云层和远低于适宜气候的温度，并成为了一个能让星球的拥有者微科公司安置极为热敏感的计算与制造中心的理想地点。 可能存在的飞船开采矿物： 铁 冰 火神石 量子矿 可能存在的手持开采矿物： 紫钠水晶 暗橄榄石 加纳石 可能存在的可采摘物： 皮坦布果 黄金麦德蒙果 日落浆果 森林之心 兰塔有机粪便（洞穴） 阿米什瘟疫（洞穴） 蓝月菌（洞穴） 可能存在的生物： 寇骈犬 啼笑鸟 故夕食草兽

Moons.DescriptionEN: Named after the ancient Greek muse who inspires eloquence to supposedly remind those gazing upon the moon from microTech to ‘strive for pure expression of thought.’ Potential Ship Mineables: Iron Ice Hephaestanite Quantainium Potential Hand Mineables: Aphorite Dolivine Janalite
Moons.DescriptionCN: 据说是以启迪了雄辩的古希腊文艺女神为名，从而提醒那些在微科星上凝视这颗卫星的人们“努力追求思想的纯粹表达”。 可能存在的飞船开采矿物： 铁 冰 火神石 量子矿 可能存在的手持开采矿物： 紫钠水晶 暗橄榄石 加纳石

SpaceStations.DescriptionEN: Located in the trade lane above microTech, Port Tressler is the main transfer hub for New Babbage. Millions of SCU pass through this station everyday between exports from microTech and the other companies on the surface and the resources and trade coming in from the other systems. Includes shops and services like: Refueling, Restocking, Cargo Transfers, Ship Components, Personal Armor, Clothing, Food, a Clinic, and Habs.
SpaceStations.DescriptionCN: 坐落于微科星上空商道的特雷斯勒空间站，是新巴贝奇的主要中转枢纽。微科公司和地表上其它公司的出口货物，以及来自其他星系的资源和贸易造就了这个太空站每天数以百万SCU的货物吞吐量。这里有许多商店和服务，你可以运输货物、购买飞船部件、个人护甲、衣物、食品，还提供燃料补充、弹药补给和住宿以及医疗服务。

SpaceStations.DescriptionEN: Located at the L1 Lagrange point of ArcCorp (Stanton III), Rest & Relax's Wide Forest Station offers a wide variety of shops and services for the weary traveler including: Refueling, Restocking, Ship Components, Personal Armor, Personal Weapons, Food, a Clinic, and Habs. Also features a Refinery.
